ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed (e.g., none, low, high) */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation level (e.g., none, slight, heavy) */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date the weather condition was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of weather recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the time of weather recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day (e.g., weekday, weekend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., spring, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Number of the bus */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the bus */,
  "bus_type" TEXT /* Type of bus (e.g., ordinary, express, articulated) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_arrival_times" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrival time */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the bus */,
  "predicted_arrival_time" TEXT /* Predicted arrival time of the bus */,
  "delay" REAL /* Actual delay of the bus */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_arrival_times_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_arrival_times_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_arrival_times_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_arrival_times_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_departure_times" (
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departure time */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the bus */,
  "predicted_departure_time" TEXT /* Predicted departure time of the bus */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("departure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_departure_times_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_departure_times_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_departure_times_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_departure_times_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay prediction */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "delay_likelihood" REAL /* Predicted likelihood of bus delay */,
  "delay_category" TEXT /* Category of delay (e.g., slight, moderate, severe) */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_delays_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_delays_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_delays_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_delays_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_number" TEXT /* Number of the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_number" TEXT /* Number of the stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_route_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_route_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_route_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_stop_arrival_times" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrival time */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the bus at the stop */,
  "delay" REAL /* Actual delay of the bus at the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stop_arrival_times_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stop_arrival_times_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
